channel.title: Multi-Sector News
channel.description: News across AI, Biotech, Crypto, and Finance sectors

item.title: DeepMind AlphaFold 3 Predicts Protein-Drug Binding With 94% Accuracy
item.description: Google DeepMind's latest AlphaFold iteration can now predict how small-molecule drugs bind to protein targets, a capability that could cut early-stage drug discovery timelines from years to weeks. Pharma partners including Pfizer and AstraZeneca are already integrating the API.

item.title: Bitcoin ETF Inflows Hit Record $3.2B in Single Week as Institutional Demand Surges
item.description: Spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded their largest weekly inflow since launch, with BlackRock's iShares Bitcoin Trust alone attracting $1.8B. Analysts attribute the surge to pension funds rebalancing into digital assets following updated fiduciary guidance from the Department of Labor.

item.title: CRISPR Trial Shows 89% Remission Rate in Aggressive Leukemia Patients
item.description: A Phase II clinical trial from Beam Therapeutics using base-editing CRISPR technology demonstrated an 89% complete remission rate in patients with relapsed or refractory acute lymphoblastic leukemia. The FDA granted Breakthrough Therapy designation, accelerating the path to approval.

item.title: Ethereum Layer-2 Networks Process More Transactions Than Base Chain for First Time
item.description: Layer-2 scaling solutions including Arbitrum, Optimism, and Base collectively processed 58% of all Ethereum ecosystem transactions in February 2026, surpassing the mainnet for the first time. Average transaction costs on L2s fell below $0.002, enabling micropayment use cases previously uneconomical.
